About.title: About me
About.paragraph1: I am Victor, a web developer focused on building clear, fast, and functional digital experiences with modern technologies such as React, Next.js, and TypeScript.
About.paragraph2: I enjoy continuous learning, teamwork, and solving real-world challenges with maintainable, results-oriented solutions.
About.paragraph3: I am also interested in interface design and performance optimization to deliver products with a great end-to-end user experience.

Technologies.title: Technologies
Technologies.description: I have worked with a variety of technologies and frameworks, including:

AboutPage.text: Hi! I'm Victor, a web developer passionate about creating engaging and functional digital experiences. I specialize in modern technologies such as React, Next.js, and TypeScript. I enjoy continuous learning, teamwork, and taking on new challenges. My goal is to deliver creative and efficient solutions in every project while always maintaining quality and attention to detail. Besides coding, I am interested in interface design and web performance optimization. I'm ready to contribute and keep growing in software development.
